name: MSI MAG B550 TOMAHAWK MAX WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-5100+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0/3.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6E (B550TMHWKMWI)
shortName: MSI MAG B550 TOMAHAWK MAX WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD
description: ATX AMD B550 gaming motherboard with PCIe 4.0, DDR4-5100 support, and WiFi 6E.
